name: OpenClaw
description: Self-hosted, personal AI assistant you run on your own devices. Integrates with WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, iMessage, Matrix, and many more channels. Local-first operation with live Canvas rendering.

name: CLI-Anything
description: Making ALL Software Agent-Native - A framework to bridge AI agents with command-line software. Provides CLI-Hub, a centralized registry to browse, install, and manage community-built CLIs for agent automation.

name: DeepTutor
description: Agent-native personalized learning assistant with multi-agent tutoring system. Features TutorBot, Co-Writer collaboration, Book Engine with 14 block types, and RAG-based knowledge access for personalized education.

name: OpenCode
description: Open-source AI coding assistant designed to run locally. Features built-in agents for analysis, code exploration, and multi-step tasks with LSP support out of the box.

name: Void Editor
description: Open-source AI-native code editor forked from VS Code. Provides privacy-focused AI coding assistance with local model support.

name: PocketPal AI
description: Open-source app that brings small language models directly to your phone. Run AI locally on mobile devices without internet connection.

name: OpenSRE
description: Build your own AI SRE agents. Open source toolkit for the AI era with Better Stack Telemetry integration and comprehensive monitoring capabilities.

name: Quary
description: Open-source BI for engineers. Modern business intelligence tool designed for developer workflows with SQL-first approach.

name: Mage.ai
description: Modern open-source data pipeline tool for integrating and transforming data. Alternative to Airflow with better developer experience.

name: LocalAI
description: Open-source AI engine running LLMs, vision, voice, image, and video models on any hardware. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI API, fully local.

name: Continue
description: Most installed open-source AI extension for VS Code and JetBrains. Autocomplete, chat, and code understanding with any LLM.

name: Avante.nvim
description: Neovim plugin that brings Cursor-like AI IDE features to Vim. Edit code with natural language, generate code from context, and chat about your codebase.
